creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Building this port results in:

compile:
    [javac] /tmp/ports/.amd_mnt/faz/host/usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/build.xml:184: wa
rning: 'includeantruntime' was not set, defaulting to build.sysclasspath=last; set to false for repeatable builds
    [javac] Compiling 139 source files to /tmp/ports/.amd_mnt/faz/host/usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-ht
tpclient-3.1/target/classes
    [javac] /tmp/ports/.amd_mnt/faz/host/usr/ports/java/jakarta-commons-httpclient/work/commons-httpclient-3.1/src/java/org/apac
he/commons/httpclient/HttpContentTooLargeException.java:6: error: unmappable character for encoding UTF8
    [javac]  * @author Ortwin Gl�ck
    [javac]                     ^
    [javac] 1 error

It uses java/openjdk7 on my machine.
